name: benefits-13
title: Benefits 13 – Card grid with section header
description: A layout with a section header followed by a grid of equal-height cards. Each card includes an icon, title, and short text, arranged in a consistent grid that collapses responsively. Use when you need a structured, repeatable set of items with strong visual separation.

files.content:
import type { ReactNode } from "react"; import { FeaturedIcon } from "@/components/shadcncraft/pro-marketing/featured-icon"; import { SectionHeading, SectionHeadingBody, SectionHeadingTagline, SectionHeadingTitle, } from "@/components/shadcncraft/pro-marketing/section-heading"; import { IconPlaceholder } from "@/registry/icons/icon-placeholder"; export function Benefits13() { return (
{/* Section Heading */} Benefits Why Choose Acme Inc. Discover the key advantages that make Acme Inc. the right choice for your team. {/* Benefits Grid */}
{benefitsData.map((benefit) => (
{benefit.icon}

{benefit.title}

{benefit.description}

))}
); } const benefitsData: { icon: ReactNode; title: string; description: string }[] = [ { icon: ( ), title: "Intelligent Prioritization", description: "Know exactly what to work on next with AI that understands your goals and context. Prioritize smarter with Acme Inc.", }, { icon: ( ), title: "Effortless Integration", description: "Acme Inc. connects seamlessly with the tools your team already uses, so there's no steep learning curve or disruption.", }, { icon: ( ), title: "Clear Decision Support", description: "When projects stall, it's rarely because of lack of effort, it's lack of clarity. Acme Inc. provides AI-driven insights.", }, { icon: ( ), title: "Smarter Analytics", description: "Turn data into clarity with AI-powered insights that help you act faster and more confidently.", }, { icon: ( ), title: "Seamless Workflow", description: "Stay in the zone without constant context switching across apps and tools.", }, { icon: ( ), title: "Team Alignment", description: "Keep everyone on the same page with a single source of truth for projects and decisions.", }, ];
